checks.wrongDistance: The ball didn't roll the right distance for this shot. It should travel exactly the shot length from the tee.
checks.missingPositions: The ball must roll through each position one step at a time.
checks.stayOnGrassPlain: The ball should stay on the grass for this shot — it shouldn't drop into the hole.
checks.stayOnGrassOvershot: The ball overshot the hole, so it should stay on the grass — it shouldn't drop in.
checks.droppedIncorrectly: The ball reached the hole but didn't drop down into it correctly.
checks.noFireworksPeriod: You shouldn't have fired the fireworks.
checks.noFireworksNoPeriod: You shouldn't have fired the fireworks
checks.noFireworksAtEnd: You shouldn't have fired the fireworks at the end.
checks.shouldFireFireworks: You should fire the fireworks at the end.

checkShot.name: Check if the shot lands in the hole
checkShot.description: Roll the ball based on the shot length, and if it lands over the hole, sink it! Then fire fireworks.

tooShort.name: Shot too short
tooShort.description: The golfer hits the ball 23 — it doesn't reach the hole.

justTooShort.name: Just too short
justTooShort.description: The golfer hits the ball 57 and it just doesn't quite roll in.

justTooFar.name: Just too far
justTooFar.description: The golfer hits the ball 63 and it just pops out the other side

tooLong.name: Shot too long
tooLong.description: The golfer hits the ball 68 — it goes past the hole.

justInsideLeft.name: Just in the hole
justInsideLeft.description: The golfer hits the ball 58 — it just reaches the hole!

justInsideRight.name: Nearly too far but ok!
justInsideRight.description: The golfer hits the ball 62 — it just about stays in the hole!

howDoIRollRightDistance.question: How do I roll the ball the right distance for each shot?
howDoIRollRightDistance.answer: Use `getShotLength()` to find out how far the golfer hit the ball, and store it in a variable. That tells you how many times to roll.

howDoIMoveOneStep.question: How do I move the ball one step at a time instead of jumping it to the end?
howDoIMoveOneStep.answer: Keep a variable for the ball's `x` position. Each time round the loop, increase it by one and then roll to the new position.

whenShouldBallDrop.question: When should the ball drop into the hole?
whenShouldBallDrop.answer: Only when the shot lands in the hole. Check whether the shot length is within the winning range by testing the lower and upper bounds together in one condition.

whenShouldFireworksFire.question: When should the fireworks fire?
whenShouldFireworksFire.answer: Only for a shot that landed in the hole, and only once the ball has finished dropping to the bottom. Keep the drop and the fireworks together inside the same condition.

moveTo.description: Moves the ball to position **(x, y)**.

getShotLength.description: Returns the **length of the shot** — how many units the ball travels to the right.
